headers.title: GOLDMETRICS - The Ultimate Mineral Tracking Solution
headers.description: GOLDMETRICS is a cutting-edge mineral tracking system designed to provide real-time location monitoring, advanced logistical features, and seamless integration for both personal and commercial use.

heroSection.slogan: The new era of intelligent mineral security and management with GoldCheck.

mission.title: Mission
mission.content: Our mission is to develop cutting-edge technologies that enable the tracking, examination, and verification of the origin of minerals, ensuring product authenticity and actively promoting social responsibility within the industry.

vision.title: Vision
vision.content: Our vision is to establish ourselves as the leading mining traceability company in Latin America, connecting the entire value chain—from the mine to the consumer—with reliable, immutable, and verifiable information.

benefit1.title: Mineral Management
benefit1.desc: Monitor and manage mineral batches effortlessly through an intuitive interface, saving time and operational resources.

benefit2.title: Enhanced Security
benefit2.desc: Advanced security features protect transport vehicles and mineral batches from unauthorized access and tampering.

benefit3.title: Real-time Insights
benefit3.desc: Get instant access to critical mineral routing data, enabling informed decision-making and proactive management.

benefit4.title: Cost Efficiency
benefit4.desc: Reduce operational costs through smarter fleet management and optimized resource allocation across the supply chain.

benefit5.title: Compliance Assurance
benefit5.desc: Ensure adherence to industry regulations with comprehensive reporting, documentation and automated audit trails.

benefit6.title: User-Friendly Experience
benefit6.desc: Enjoy a seamless experience across all devices with our intuitive platform, built for every role in the chain.

telemetrySection.title: Where Telemetry and Security Meets
telemetrySection.content: GoldCheck offers an advanced telemetry platform that provides real-time monitoring of location, speed, vehicle status, and other critical data. Our cutting-edge technology allows users to access detailed information about their mineral using products and their origins, providing a comprehensive overview for efficient and ethical decissions.
telemetrySection.bullet1: Controller Area Network (CAN) Integration: GoldCheck seamlessly integrates with the transporting vehicle's CAN bus, allowing for comprehensive data collection and monitoring of various parameters such as engine performance, fuel levels, and more.
telemetrySection.bullet2: Geographic Information System (GIS) Mapping: Our platform utilizes GIS mapping technology to provide real-time location tracking and geofencing capabilities, ensuring you always know where the transporting vehicles are to keep track of the hauling cycle.
telemetrySection.bullet3: Custom Alerts and Notifications: GoldCheck allows you to set up custom alerts and notifications based on specific events or conditions, such as unauthorized movement, speeding, or maintenance reminders, keeping mining operators informed and in control at all times. Give permissions and keep a track of route patterns.

segment1.title: Consumers
segment1.description: Scan the QR code in the items you buy to be able to see its certification and the whole hauling cycle it went through.

segment2.title: Enterprises and Jewelries
segment2.description: Manage your fleet's location, certificate the mineral's data and integrate our system to your preexisting infraestructure for an enhanced data security and management experience.

videos.title: Get to Know Us
videos.subtitle: Watch our story and discover how GoldCheck brings trust to the gold chain.

testimonials.title: Success Stories
testimonials.subtitle: Real experiences from those who trust GoldCheck across the gold chain.

t1.text: Before, we had to manually track every batch from the mine to the refinery. With GoldCheck I have real-time visibility of the whole fleet, I get automatic alerts whenever there is an anomaly, and if an incident happens I log it in seconds. Now I can show my clients exactly where every gram of gold we extract comes from.
t1.name: Anthony Paredes

t2.text: Before, when a customer asked about the origin of the gold, I had no way to prove it. Now they scan the code on the piece and see the whole chain: which mine it came from, how it was transported, whether it is conflict-free. That sets me apart from the competition and builds real trust with my customers.
t2.name: Yesiliany Canchica

t3.text: I was always worried about not really knowing where the gold in the jewelry I bought came from. With GoldCheck that changed: I went into the platform, searched for the product and could see the mineral's full history, from extraction to the jewelry store. Knowing the gold is ethical and conflict-free gives me a peace of mind I did not have before.
t3.name: Carla Gallardo

legal.termsIntro: Welcome to GoldCheck, a mineral traceability platform operated by GoldMetrics. By accessing or using our services you agree to be bound by these terms.
legal.termsAccept: By creating an account or using any GoldCheck service, you confirm that you have read, understood and agree to these Terms & Conditions. If you do not agree, you must not use the platform.
legal.termsUse: GoldCheck is intended for lawful mineral traceability, certification verification and supply-chain transparency purposes. You agree not to misuse the platform, falsify traceability records or attempt to circumvent verification mechanisms.
legal.termsData: We collect and process personal data in accordance with our Privacy Policy. Production and extraction data submitted by mining operators is treated as confidential and is only shared with authorized parties within the supply chain.
legal.termsIp: All content, trademarks, logos and software on GoldCheck are the property of GoldMetrics. You may not reproduce, distribute or create derivative works without prior written consent.
legal.termsLiability: GoldCheck provides traceability information on an "as-is" basis. GoldMetrics shall not be liable for indirect, incidental or consequential damages arising from the use of the platform.
legal.termsEthics: GoldMetrics operates in accordance with the ACM/IEEE Software Engineering Code of Ethics and the CIP Code of Ethics, promoting transparency, honesty and responsibility in all aspects of the platform.
legal.termsChanges: We reserve the right to update these terms at any time. Continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.
legal.privacyIntro: GoldMetrics is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use and safeguard your personal information when you use the GoldCheck platform.
legal.privacyCollect: We collect information you provide directly (name, email, company details) and data generated through platform usage (traceability records, verification logs, analytics).
legal.privacyUse: Your information is used to provide traceability services, generate certifications, improve platform functionality and communicate important updates. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
legal.privacySecurity: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption, access controls and regular audits to protect your data against unauthorized access, alteration or destruction.
legal.privacyRights: You have the right to access, correct or delete your personal data at any time. You may also request a copy of the data we hold about you by contacting our support team.
legal.privacyCookies: GoldCheck uses essential cookies to maintain your session and language preferences. We do not use third-party tracking cookies for advertising purposes.
legal.privacyContact: For questions about this Privacy Policy, contact us at privacy@goldmetrics.com.

q1.question: What is GoldCheck and how does it work?
q1.answer: GoldCheck is a gold traceability platform that uses IoT sensors and QR certification to track minerals in real time from the mine to the end consumer, ensuring authenticity and transparency across the entire supply chain.

q2.question: What type of minerals does GoldCheck support?
q2.answer: GoldCheck is primarily focused on gold and precious minerals. Our platform supports the full traceability cycle regardless of the mineral's origin or processing stage.

q3.question: How secure is my data on the platform?
q3.answer: We use end-to-end encryption and comply with international data protection regulations. Your data is stored in certified secure servers and is never shared with third parties without your consent.

q4.question: Can I manage multiple products or batches at the same time?
q4.answer: Absolutely. Our Gold and Platinum plans allow you to manage large volumes of certified pieces or mineral batches from a single dashboard, with full traceability for each one.

q5.question: What happens if the transport vehicle loses signal during transit?
q5.answer: The device stores data locally and syncs automatically once connectivity is restored, ensuring no gaps in the mineral's transport history or certification chain.
